     1→   400→   400→     INDUSTRIES
     2→   401→   401→  ==========================================================*/
     3→   402→   402→  .ind-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); gap:16px; margin-top:50px;}
     4→   403→   403→  .ind-card{
     5→   404→   404→    background:var(--navy); color:#fff; border-radius:18px; padding:24px 20px; min-height:230px;
     6→   405→   405→    display:flex; flex-direction:column; justify-content:flex-end; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
     7→   406→   406→    transition:transform .3s ease;
     8→   407→   407→  }
     9→   408→   408→  .ind-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);}
    10→   409→   409→  .ind-card::before{content:''; position:absolute; inset:0; background:linear-gradient(200deg, rgba(46,134,171,0.5), rgba(18,23,43,0.2)); opacity:0; transition:opacity .3s ease;}
    11→   410→   410→  .ind-card:hover::before{opacity:1;}
    12→   411→   411→  .ind-card .ind-icon{width:38px; height:38px; margin-bottom:auto;}
    13→   412→   412→  .ind-card .ind-icon svg{width:100%; height:100%; color:var(--green);}
    14→   413→   413→  .ind-card h4{font-size:15.5px; font-weight:700; position:relative; z-index:1;}
    15→   414→   414→  .ind-card p{font-size:12px; opacity:.75; margin-top:7px; position:relative; z-index:1;}
    16→   415→   415→  @media(max-width:1080px){ .ind-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} .ind-card{min-height:190px;} }
    17→   416→   416→  @media(max-width:560px){ .ind-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    18→   417→   417→
    19→   418→   418→  /* =========================================================
    20→   419→   419→     PRICING
    21→   420→   420→  ==========================================================*/
    22→   421→   421→  .price-table{width:100%; border-collapse:separate; border-spacing:0; margin-top:44px; background:#fff; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:var(--shadow); border:1px solid var(--line);}
    23→   422→   422→  .price-table th, .price-table td{padding:18px 22px; text-align:left; font-size:14.5px;}
    24→   423→   423→  .price-table thead th{background:var(--navy); color:#fff; font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-weight:600; font-size:13.5px;}
    25→   424→   424→  .price-table tbody tr:nth-child(even){background:#FAFAF7;}
    26→   425→   425→  .price-table td.price{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; font-weight:700; color:var(--blue-deep); font-size:16px;}
    27→   426→   426→  .price-table td.badge{font-size:11px; font-weight:800; color:var(--green);}
    28→   427→   427→  .price-note{margin-top:18px; font-size:13.5px; color:#5b5f70; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;}
    29→   428→   428→  .price-note svg{width:18px; height:18px; color:var(--green);}
    30→   429→   429→  @media(max-width:768px){ .price-table{font-size:12px;} .price-table th, .price-table td{padding:12px;} }
    31→   430→   430→
    32→   431→   431→  /* =========================================================
    33→   432→   432→     TESTIMONIALS
    34→   433→   433→  ==========================================================*/
    35→   434→   434→  .testi-wrap{margin-top:50px; position:relative; max-width:760px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; text-align:center;}
    36→   435→   435→  .testi-slide{display:none;}
    37→   436→   436→  .testi-slide.active{display:block; animation:fadeQuote .6s ease;}
    38→   437→   437→  @keyframes fadeQuote{from{opacity:0; transform:translateY(10px);} to{opacity:1; transform:translateY(0);}}
    39→   438→   438→  .testi-slide p{font-family:'Playfair Display', serif; font-style:italic; font-size:clamp(19px,2.4vw,26px); color:var(--navy); line-height:1.55;}
    40→   439→   439→  .testi-slide .who{margin-top:22px; font-weight:700; font-size:14px; color:var(--blue-deep);}
    41→   440→   440→  .testi-slide .who span{font-weight:500; color:#666;}
    42→   441→   441→  .testi-dots{display:flex; justify-content:center; gap:8px; margin-top:30px;}
    43→   442→   442→  .testi-dots button{width:9px; height:9px; border-radius:50%; border:none; background:var(--line);}
    44→   443→   443→  .testi-dots button.active{background:var(--blue); width:24px; border-radius:6px; transition:all .3s ease;}
    45→   444→   444→  .stars{color:var(--red); font-size:18px; letter-spacing:3px; margin-bottom:6px;}
    46→   445→   445→
    47→   446→   446→  /* =========================================================
    48→   447→   447→     BLOG
    49→   448→   448→  ==========================================================*/
    50→   449→   449→  .blog-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr); gap:22px; margin-top:50px;}
    51→   450→   450→  .blog-card{background:#fff; border-radius:18px; overflow:hidden; border:1px solid var(--line); transition:all .3s ease;}
    52→   451→   451→  .blog-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px); box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
    53→   452→   452→  .blog-thumb{height:120px; background:var(--droplet-gradient); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; opacity:0.9;}
    54→   453→   453→  .blog-thumb svg{width:34px; height:34px; color:#fff; opacity:.85;}
    55→   454→   454→  .blog-body{padding:20px;}
    56→   455→   455→  .blog-cat{font-size:10.5px; font-weight:800; letter-spacing:.05em; text-transform:uppercase; color:var(--blue);}
    57→   456→   456→  .blog-card h4{font-size:15px; font-weight:700; margin-top:9px; color:var(--navy); line-height:1.35;}
    58→   457→   457→  .blog-meta{margin-top:12px; font-size:12px; color:#8a8d9a; display:flex; justify-content:space-between;}
    59→   458→   458→  @media(max-width:1080px){ .blog-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
    60→   459→   459→  @media(max-width:560px){ .blog-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    61→   460→   460→
    62→   461→   461→  /* =========================================================
    63→   462→   462→     FINAL CTA
    64→   463→   463→  ==========================================================*/
    65→   464→   464→  .final-cta{
    66→   465→   465→    background:var(--navy); color:#fff; border-radius:28px; padding:70px 50px; text-align:center; position:relative; overflow:hidden;
    67→   466→   466→  }
    68→   467→   467→  .final-cta h2{font-size:clamp(26px,3.6vw,42px); position:relative; z-index:2;}
    69→   468→   468→  .final-cta p{margin-top:14px; font-size:16.5px; opacity:.8; max-width:560px; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto; position:relative; z-index:2;}
    70→   469→   469→  .final-cta .hero-actions{justify-content:center; margin-top:32px; position:relative; z-index:2;}
    71→   470→   470→
    72→   471→   471→  /* =========================================================
    73→   472→   472→     FOOTER
    74→   473→   473→  ==========================================================*/
    75→   474→   474→  footer{background:#0D1120; color:#c7cad6; padding:80px 0 0;}
    76→   475→   475→  .foot-grid{display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.4fr repeat(4,1fr); gap:36px; padding-bottom:50px; border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);}
    77→   476→   476→  .foot-brand img{height:34px; margin-bottom:16px;}
    78→   477→   477→  .foot-brand p{font-size:13.5px; line-height:1.7; max-width:280px; color:#9296a6;}
    79→   478→   478→  .foot-social{display:flex; gap:10px; margin-top:20px;}
    80→   479→   479→  .foot-social a{width:34px; height:34px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; transition:all .2s ease;}
    81→   480→   480→  .foot-social a:hover{background:var(--blue); border-color:var(--blue);}
    82→   481→   481→  .foot-social svg{width:15px; height:15px;}
    83→   482→   482→  .foot-col h5{font-family:'Poppins',sans-serif; color:#fff; font-size:13.5px; letter-spacing:.04em; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:18px;}
    84→   483→   483→  .foot-col ul{display:grid; gap:11px;}
    85→   484→   484→  .foot-col a{font-size:13.5px; color:#9296a6; transition:color .2s ease;}
    86→   485→   485→  .foot-col a:hover{color:#fff;}
    87→   486→   486→  .foot-bottom{display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:26px 0; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:12px; font-size:12.5px; color:#71748a;}
    88→   487→   487→  .foot-bottom .legal-links{display:flex; gap:20px;}
    89→   488→   488→  @media(max-width:960px){ .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);} }
    90→   489→   489→  @media(max-width:560px){ .foot-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} }
    91→   490→   490→
    92→   491→   491→  ::selection{background:var(--green); color:#fff;}
    93→   492→   492→</style>
    94→   493→   493→</head>

   291→   690→   690→<section class="hero">
   292→   691→   691→  <div class="ripple-field" style="right:-250px; top:-150px; width:900px; height:900px;">
   293→   692→   692→    <div class="ripple r1"></div><div class="ripple r2"></div><div class="ripple r3"></div><div class="ripple r4"></div>
   294→   693→   693→  </div>
   295→   694→   694→  <div class="wrap">
   296→   695→   695→    <div class="hero-copy reveal">
   297→   696→   696→      <span class="eyebrow">Premium Deep Cleaning · Scotland-Wide</span>
   298→   697→   697→      <h1>The deep clean Scotland trusts with <em>its deposit.</em></h1>
   299→   698→   698→      <p class="lede">From Glasgow tenements to Aberdeen offices, MaundyClean pairs premium, insured deep-cleaning teams with the only <strong>100% Deposit-Back Guarantee</strong> in Scottish cleaning — personal service, fair prices, no corporate call centres.</p>
   300→   699→   699→      <div class="hero-actions">
   301→   700→   700→        <a href="#pricing" class="btn btn-cta">Get a 30-Second Quote</a>
   302→   701→   701→        <a href="#guarantee" class="btn btn-outline on-light">See the Guarantee →</a>
